summary: Completed comprehensive testing of UMKM directory website. Backend APIs mostly functional (93.3% success rate) with one auth issue. Frontend core functionality works but has critical issues with CRUD operations and logout.

critical_bugs.issue: Stats endpoint not properly protected - returns 200 instead of 401 when no auth token provided
critical_bugs.impact: Security vulnerability - unauthorized access to admin statistics

ui_bugs.issue: Only 1 stats card displayed instead of expected 4 cards
Shows 0 UMKM entries despite backend having 12 entries

integration_issues.issue: Logout functionality fails with timeout, doesn't redirect to homepage

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero, categories, featured UMKM cards
All backend API endpoints (except auth protection issue)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical dashboard data loading issues (stats cards and UMKM table showing empty), resolve UMKM form validation errors (422), fix logout functionality, and secure /api/stats endpoint authentication
